creator: tony@hain-global-consulting.com
text:
Console screen can't be captured. Dmesg from subsequent boot is below...

Scrollback buffer from putty at crash time:

root@arabian:/usr/home/tony #
root@arabian:/usr/home/tony #
root@arabian:/usr/home/tony # sysctl -a
